Home / Services / Electrical Services

Electrical Services

Safe and reliable electrical services for repairs, installations, and upgrades.

B & D Handyman Services provides safe and reliable electrical services to meet all your electrical needs in Virginia Beach. Electrical work can be dangerous, so it's crucial to hire a qualified professional. Our experienced electricians are licensed and insured, and they adhere to the highest safety standards.

We offer a wide range of electrical services, including electrical repairs, electrical installations, electrical upgrades, and electrical inspections. Whether you need to fix a faulty outlet, install new lighting, or upgrade your electrical panel, we've got you covered.

We're committed to providing you with exceptional service and exceeding your expectations. We offer upfront pricing and stand behind our work. We prioritize safety and ensure that all electrical work is performed to code. From older homes near First Landing State Park to newer developments, we handle all types of electrical projects.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Thorough Assessment: We assess the electrical issue and identify the best solution.
  2. 02 Step 2: Detailed Estimate: We provide a clear and transparent estimate for the work.
  3. 03 Step 3: Safe and Expert Service: Our licensed electricians perform the work safely and efficiently.
  4. 04 Step 4: System Testing: We test the electrical system to ensure proper functionality and safety.

Benefits

  • Ensure the safety of your home and family.
  • Prevent electrical fires and other hazards.
  • Improve the functionality and efficiency of your electrical system.
  • Receive expert service from licensed and insured electricians.

Frequently Asked Questions

Are you licensed and insured?

Yes, B & D Handyman Services is fully licensed and insured to perform electrical work in Virginia Beach.

How often should I have my electrical system inspected?

It's recommended to have your electrical system inspected every 3-5 years, or more frequently if you have an older home.

What are the signs of an electrical problem?

Signs of an electrical problem include flickering lights, burning smells, and frequently tripping breakers.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with electrical services? Contact us today.
